subcodes.first_line: The Day is come, and the people are in manifest drunkenness. The very stone doth speak forth and announceth unto mankind the Most Great Vision, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الیوم و القوم فی سکر مبین و ینطق الحجر و یبشر الناس بالمنظر الاکبر ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @Word of God the cause of creation
